alerts.title: House passes war powers resolution directing Trump to end Iran hostilities
alerts.summary: U.S. House of Representatives has passed a war powers resolution instructing President Trump to terminate hostilities with Iran, signaling congressional pressure to de-escalate. This represents a major shift in domestic U.S. political posture amid active Persian Gulf military operations. Incidents feed and sentiment data confirm passage; sentiment shows "trump" as dominant term (88 mentions) amid elevated negative sentiment (45%).

alerts.title: Kuwait, Bahrain, Iran clash escalates: multiple strikes across Gulf states
alerts.summary: Active multi-location attack campaign across Persian Gulf with Iran claiming strikes on Camp Buehring (Kuwait), Ali Al-Salem Airbase, and Kuwait International Airport (lat 32.1-32.2, lon 52.8-52.9). U.S. military reports it defeated Iranian missile/drone attacks; simultaneously U.S. fired Hellfire missiles at tanker bound for Iran. Kuwait labeled Iran action 'heinous aggression.' Multiple corroborating reports (Reuters, Al Jazeera, Japan Times) confirm active kinetic exchange.

alerts.title: U.S. domestic sentiment increasingly negative on Iran conflict; Trump policy shift signals
alerts.summary: U.S. sentiment analysis shows 45% negative vs 43% positive on Middle East conflict, with 'trump' (88 mentions), 'war' (20 mentions), 'resolution' (13 mentions) dominating. WSJ exclusive reports Trump tells aides he will not resume all-out war unless U.S. troops killed—a material policy constraint. Sentiment shift toward restraint paired with congressional war powers action suggests potential de-escalation trajectory despite active kinetic operations.

alerts.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire partially implemented but fighting persists; Beirut at risk
alerts.summary: Multiple sources report Israel-Lebanon ceasefire agreement with conditions, yet attacks continue. 9 confirmed deaths in Lebanese strikes reaching Beirut outskirts (lat 33.8-34.1, lon 35.4-35.8). Hezbollah confirmed exchanging strikes with Israeli forces. INSS researcher warns Trump-Netanyahu call and restraint on Beirut signals 'Iranian victory.' Active incidents cluster across Lebanon border indicates ceasefire fragility despite diplomatic agreement.

alerts.title: Ukraine launches ~354 drone strikes on Russian targets; St. Petersburg hit amid PMEF
alerts.summary: Rybar Telegram (~238K-316K views on duplicate posts) reports Ukrainian forces conducted mass drone attack targeting Leningrad Oblast and St. Petersburg on opening day of Russian PMEF conference. Russian Ministry of Defense claims ~59 of 354 drones intercepted over Leningrad Oblast; infrastructure damage reported in Kronstadt, Kirovskyy, Krasnoselysk districts. Signal indicates escalation of Ukrainian deep-strike capability amid broader conflict intensification.

analysis_note: Escalation pauses amid political friction: U.S. Congress and Trump administration signal restrain on Iran conflict even as kinetic operations persist across Persian Gulf; Israel-Lebanon ceasefire fragile; nuclear breakout window remains critical ~1-2 weeks; Ukraine sustains deep-strike tempo against Russian rear areas.
